drills.name: Cone Slalom
drills.instructions: Set 8 cones in a line, 1 m apart. Dribble through using alternate feet. 10 runs at 70% pace, 5 at full pace.
drills.coach_tip: Keep the ball within one touch of your feet at all times.

drills.name: 1v1 Box Dribbling
drills.instructions: 5 m × 5 m box. Attacker must dribble past defender and touch far cone. 2-minute rounds, swap roles.
drills.coach_tip: Use a body feint before accelerating. Commit to your move.

drills.name: Speed Dribble Sprint
drills.instructions: 20 m straight line. Sprint with the ball from cone to cone. 8 reps. Count touches — aim for 3–4 touches maximum.
drills.coach_tip: Push the ball ahead of you further than feels comfortable. Trust your pace.
drills.progression: Add a 90-degree turn at the end.
